description: 2 SAC To Bury Command Capsule Underground OMAHA NANA A twin to the Strategic Air Commands famous Red telephone ready to order instant nuclear retaliation should Russia strike is to be in stalled in a vault hewn out of bedrock more than threequarters of a mile beneath the earths sur face The extension phone along with other elements of a highlysophis ticated alerting system and a special group of about 150 hand picked SAC personnel will be stationed in the deeplyburied capsule which would be imper vious to even a direct hit by the Jargest Hbomb the Soviet Union could make and deliver In the event SAC headquar ters and its shallow4sfeet deepp r e s e n t underground command post here were wiped out the staff of generals and their assistants in the deep war room would take control of SACs intercontinental ballistic missiles and surviving bombers_ Electronic computers emplaced 4500 feet below ground Ilevel would provide nearinstant evalu ations of the state and capability of SAC to punish the aggressor Powerful radio equipment would pour out commands from antennae strung ouf in deep rock tunnels The orders would be received by launch control crews for Min uteman
